---
title: "Notices"
pagetitle: "Notices – CANCOTS 2027"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-body">
<main class="content">
```

## Notices & Announcements

*Conference notices and announcements will be posted here as they become available.*

---

*No notices at this time. Please check back later.*

```{=html}
</main>

<aside class="sidebar">
  <div class="sidebar-box news">
    <h3>Latest Notice</h3>
    <p>No notices yet.</p>
  </div>
</aside>
</div>
```
